title: Incorrect constant detection for an array of interfaces

features.name: interface array with genvar index in generate loop
features.description: Code should include an interface array accessed via genvar index inside a generate loop, where the interface array elements are used in dotted references

features.name: dotted reference to interface array element via genvar
features.description: Code should include a dotted reference to an interface array element where the index is a genvar from an enclosing generate loop
